---
title: "R training"
format: html
author: vielhabg
date: 2026-03-18
editor: visual
---


```{r}
1 + 1
```

```{r}
3
4
typeof(8.5)
```

```{r}
"yours"
```

```{r}
a <- c(1,2,3)
a
c("a","b","c")
c(TRUE,FALSE)
c(1,"two",3)
```



```{r}
#| label: setup
source("training_source.R")
```

```{r}
csv_path <- "../data/raw/presurvey_20260317.csv"
survey_raw <- rio::import(csv_path)
```
